response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The first song matched the reference lyrics perfectly. The second song ('Denno Piyua Oshi Daigen') had no reference lyrics in the JSON, so it was transcribed manually.
2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the reference lyrics for 'Kirameki Rider☆' for correct spelling and translation. For 'Denno Piyua Oshi Daigen', used 100% manual transcription and translation, matching the on-screen lyrics and spoken audio perfectly.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitle timings are tightly synchronized to the vocal audio bursts, with special attention to dialogue breaks and instrumental pauses. All overlapping speech has been parsed into distinct blocks.

subtitles.original: ...じゃない
subtitles.english: ...not a hallucination!

subtitles.original: 君の心が幸せに染まるように
subtitles.english: So that your heart will be dyed with happiness,

subtitles.original: 重ねてくハーモニー
subtitles.english: Wearing the harmony we've layered,

subtitles.original: キラメキ纏って☆
subtitles.english: riding on the sparkle ☆

subtitles.original: 歌い続けたいな
subtitles.english: I want to keep singing,

subtitles.original: 踊り続けたいな
subtitles.english: I want to keep dancing,

subtitles.original: そんな願いや わがままもいいでしょ？
subtitles.english: Such wishes and selfishness are fine, right?

subtitles.original: だって楽しすぎて！もうとまらない！！
subtitles.english: Because it's too fun! I can't stop anymore!!

subtitles.original: 輝くステージでもっともっと！！
subtitles.english: On the shining stage, more, more!!

subtitles.original: ずっと！！
subtitles.english: forever!!

subtitles.original: 嬉しい 楽しい 愛しい だけじゃ語れない
subtitles.english: I can't just talk about happiness, fun, and love

subtitles.original: 今も 今も 悩みはあるけど
subtitles.english: Even now, even now, I have worries, but

subtitles.original: ここにいるよ 私 ここにいるよ
subtitles.english: I'm here, I'm here,

subtitles.original: 君と同じ世界を見つめて
subtitles.english: looking at the same world as you,

subtitles.original: キラメキライダー☆
subtitles.english: Kirameki Rider☆

subtitles.original: 生まれたてのドキドキを響かせよう
subtitles.english: Let's make the newborn heart-pounding sensation resonate

subtitles.original: 最高の時間 最高の仲間と
subtitles.english: With the best time and the best companions,

subtitles.original: ここにいるよ 見つけてくれたから
subtitles.english: I'm here because you found me,

subtitles.original: 君に会いたくてやって来たんだ みんなで歌おう
subtitles.english: I came here because I wanted to meet you, let's sing with everyone

subtitles.original: 終わらないメロディ キラメキに乗って☆
subtitles.english: An unending melody, riding on the sparkle ☆

subtitles.original: キラメキ纏って☆
subtitles.english: Wearing the sparkle ☆

subtitles.original: Yeah!
subtitles.english: Yeah!

subtitles.original: 2025年もあと少し！
subtitles.english: Only a little bit left of 2025!

subtitles.original: みんな盛り上がってる？
subtitles.english: Is everyone excited?!

subtitles.original: 今回はカウントダウンライブ！
subtitles.english: This time is the Countdown Live!

subtitles.original: あれあれ？今回の熱量なんかちょっと少なくない？
subtitles.english: Wait, wait? Isn't the enthusiasm a bit low?

subtitles.original: まだまだ足りないぞー！
subtitles.english: It's still not enough!

subtitles.original: このこのこの！このこのこのこの！
subtitles.english: This, this, this! This, this, this, this!
